title: Panettone Cucumber Bruschetta
description: A refreshing twist on the classic Italian appetizer, combining crispy panettone with cool cucumber and tangy sardinian ingredients.
instructions: 2. Slice the panettone into 1-inch (2.5 cm) thick slices.
3. Drizzle the sardinian olive oil over the panettone slices.
4. Sprinkle the sardinian sea salt over the panettone slices.
5. Bake the panettone slices in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
6. Meanwhile, slice the cucumber into thin rounds.
7. Crumble the persian feta cheese into a bowl.
8. To assemble the bruschetta, place a toasted panettone slice on a plate, top with a slice of cucumber, and sprinkle with feta cheese.
